sections.paragraph:
only in pl. מֵישָׁרִים, more rarely מֵשָׁרִים Pro 1:3 (from the root יָשַׁר).

(1) straightness of way, hence happiness (compare Pro 3:6 11:6 ), Isa 26:7 בְּמֵישָׁרִים Pro 23:31, and לְמֵישָׁרִים Son 7:10, “in a straight (way).” Hence-(a) sincerity, probity, and adv. sincerely, Son 1:4.-(b) justice (of a judge), Psa 99:4 that which is just, Pro 1:3 8:6 Psa 17:2. בְּמֵישָׁרִים Psa 9:9, and מֵישָׁרִים Psa 58:2, adv. justly.

(2) peace, friendship, from the idea of evenness and easiness. עָשָׂה מֵישָׁרִים to make peace, Dan 11:6 comp. verse 17 Dan 11:17, and Mal 2:6.
